text.message: Sorry first time playing four players in a long time
like messing around, not playing seriously
lol I’m walking tryna get steps
guess he got it tho rip
oh bro, if you got too much sheep we can trade, do port service and stuff
what do you want for it?
i just have to risk it
we gonna have to work together again
lets see if we can do it this tme
last time i tried to work with you blue you stuffed me over
but we will need to this time
anyway orange, lets see if we can figut out a deal
do u have an extra wheat black
i dont have an extra wheat
i have wheat to trade you red
i dont think you should be trading the one guy with a city 1:1 red
so port for them, they give me an extra card as payment
its basically a 3:1 for them, and a free card for me
why would they give you a free card
and they get a port even though they dont have one
no, i netted one free qheat
and a free card for me
Low key, black and orange has no chance lol
black has to port his sheep
i took this setup for fun, ill be very surprised if i somehow win with it, would be funny tho
but oj needs to be blocked
i do agree red needs to be blocked but that 4 aint it lmao
omg, this dude trying to extort
i guess we all just lose
we'll see, my setup is awkward, hard to fight for road ore army, so probs just have to build to 10
yea but at the moment ur outproducing pretty much everyone
which is important if im going to build to 10
its getting a bit out of control
its a close game - think the robs need to be spread
bro i just pulled this dev
ur at least 2 points ahead of everyone on the table
if i didnt block that 8 ud have another city in hand rn
just want to buy a dev
black can get it next turn
just so you know red, when blue takes road and is about to win, and you beg me to fight road, my answer is gonna be no
i have a simple objective now, red loses, i'll help you win blue if i can
